results.title: Paramount Dates ‘Tomorrow, And Tomorrow, And Tomorrow’ Adaptation Starring Daisy Edgar-Jones
results.description: Paramount Pictures will release its adaptation of the best-selling novel Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow for November 12, 2027. The film stars Daisy Edgar-Jones. Siân Heder is directing and writing the screenplay based on drafts by Mark Bomback and Zevin. Temple Hill’s Wyck Godfrey, Marty Bowen and Isaac Klausner are producing the pic. Zevin is executive producing. [...]

results.title: Paramount’s ‘Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow,’ Starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Set for November 2027
results.description: Paramount’s upcoming adaptation of the best-selling novel “Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow,” starring Daisy Edgar-Jones and directed by Siân Heder, will hit theaters next November. Gabrielle Zevin’s book follows the story of two friends whose lives first intersect in childhood and college, and follows them as they become creative partners in the video game business. [...]

results.title: Daisy Edgar-Jones Starrer ‘Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow’ Lands 2027 Date
results.description: 'CODA' filmmaker Siân Heder is behind the Paramount adaptation of Gabrielle Zevin's novel.

results.title: Anya Taylor-Joy bullied at school over her looks
results.description: Anya Taylor-Joy was bullied at school over her looks.
